•   Mosaic plot (Mosaic plot) can help.  
•   We can observe the proportion and ratio of "yes" (1) and "no" (0) across different categories of faith status.  
•   In the category "I continue to attend church and have faith in Christ," the ratio of 1 to 0 is approximately 1 to 4, indicating that individuals who attend church and maintain their Christian faith are less likely to smoke.
